Email Subject Line Examples
Your subject line is the single most critical element to your email
marketing success. You can have the most amazing email copy in the
world and your efforts will still be futile if no one opens it.
Your subject line MUST grab your prospect’s attention and draw them
into taking action and clicking open your email. Here’s a few samples
of great subject lines from some really smart marketers.
Benefit-Based:
How to be a better writer in the next 10 minutes (Copyblogger)
10 tips that make you super-productive (Todd Brown)
12 compelling reasons to ditch stress from your life (Dr. Mercola)
5-second abs for more energy (Matt Furey)
7 ways to live a better life for less (Sherman Hu)
Creating your own info product is easier than you think (Clayton
Makepeace)
Do you want to retire in the next 12 months? (Agora)
Eight things you need to manage social media (ClickZ)
Great way to turn $20 into 6 figures (Bob Serling)
How to add 3-5 employees without hiring (Rich Schefren)

Questions:
Is writing obsolete? (Copyblogger)
Another economic crisis is coming. Are you prepared? (Motley fool)
Could your Adwords ROI be a little bit better? (Glen Livingston)
Do you want to retire in the next 12 months? (Agora)
Can Calcium actually make your bones weaker? (Dr Mercola)
What does this top natural doctor eat and avoid? (Bottom line
secrets)
What’s your love type? Take the test. (Bottom line secrets)
Does Google like you? Read this now… (Richard East)
Is your golf pro’s advice bad for your game? (Bottom line secrets)
Is your medicine cabinet a danger zone? (Bottom line secrets)
Controversy:
Internet Marketing is Dead. (Mike Filsaime)
Is the iPhone the most dangerous phone ever? (Dr Mercola)
The #1 reason most people aren’t rich. (Early to Rise)
This tax fact should make your blood boil (The Daily Crux)
Why being dumb is so smart. (Ken McCarthy)
Do NOT buy from this site (The Insider Code)
The myth of customer surveys (Michael Masterson)

Curiosity:
Do you do this in the morning? (Dave Dee)
It changed my entire outlook on life. (John Reese)

8 reasons NOT to join my seminar (Ted Nicholas)

Athletes use steroids – Entrepreneurs use this. (Rich Schefren)
I owe everything I know to this (Robert Ringer)
How kids make you a better copywriter (Clayton Makepeace)
I have no idea why he did this (Ryan Deiss)
If this guy can do it… (John Goldman)

10 commandments of copywriting (Bob Bly)
12 compelling reasons to ditch stress from your life (Dr Mercola)
5 foods you should never eat (Agora)
6 life secrets from Donald Trump (Bottom line secrets)
5 ways to use Twitter to improve your market (ClickZ)
17 email subject lines that dare you to look away (Art Crowley)
